mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, active FROM t_user WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT r.role FROM t_role r INNER JOIN t_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT id, username, password, active FROM t_user ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, username, password, active FROM t_user WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_user (username, password, active) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{active})
